description: Anatomical orientation configuration for cutout_st_odf_glyph.ipynb. Contains one entry per raw imaging dataset with the rotation matrix that maps zarr/image axes (z,y,x) to anatomical axes (A-P, D-V, M-L) or a chosen display convention.

usage.dec_rotation: vectors_anat = vectors @ anatomical_rotation.T  — then pass vectors_anat to img_to_dec()
usage.dec_convention: dec_rgb_order = [r_axis, g_axis, b_axis] — indices into the anatomically-rotated vector. Convention: horizontal=R, vertical=G, depth=B
usage.camera_note: CAMERA_POS is in anatomical space; adjust per dataset to get the desired view plane

datasets.name: H17_PO11_S8_20250408
datasets.anatomical_rotation_note: Flip zarr-x (dim-0) to align with A-P convention

datasets.name: H17_PO12_S4_20250501
datasets.anatomical_rotation_note: 65 deg CCW rotation in the ZY plane to align A-P axis
datasets.notes: Use H17_PO12_S4_rot65 entry if the volume was already pre-rotated 65 deg

datasets.name: H17_PO6_S3_20250422
datasets.anatomical_rotation_note: Flip zarr-x (dim-0) to align with A-P convention

datasets.name: H17_PO5_S8_20250410
datasets.anatomical_rotation_note: ZY swap followed by 174 deg CW rotation around zarr-x axis
datasets.notes: Computed as R_cw(174deg) @ P_zy where P_zy swaps zarr-y and zarr-z
